MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-28-2016 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And [Proposed] Consent Judgment As To Defendant The S.P. Richards Company
Off Calendar Jul-20-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Christopher F. Tuttle of the Chanler Group (510-848-8880) appears for plaintiff/moving party

No other appearance made in this matter.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF ANTHONY HELD'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And [Proposed] Consent Judgment As To Defendant The S.P. Richards Company is Granted. No opposition filed and the settlement is in compliance with the requirements of Proposition 65. Written order and judgment are signed and filed in open court.
